text:
単に優秀なパルチザン使いなら
これまで掃いて捨てるほどいた。

だが頂点を極めたと言える者は
残念ながら私に心当たりはない。

ドラゴン・エクスを仕留めることで
私の記憶に鮮烈な衝撃を残してくれ

Nothing special about just being a skilled
Partisan wielder. I've seen enough to last a
lifetime.

But not a single one comes to mind who really
hit the peak of what a Partisan user can do.

Want to really sear yourself into my memory?
Then get going on this Dragon X hunt.
